name: Chinese Cabbage Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all vegetables and fruit in a large bowl.
2. Mix oil, sesame oil, rice vinegar, sugar, and flavor packet in a jar and shake well.
3. Just before serving, break Ramen noodles into small pieces and mix with sesame seeds.
4. Toss the noodle mixture with the salad.
5. At the very last minute before serving, pour the dressing onto the salad and toss to combine.
